_comment: Per-product QA identities, read by provision-qa-accounts.mjs AND the portfolio-gate test-accounts audit/fixer. §9.5 CANONICAL scheme: admin-agent is the +qaadmin plus-alias and user-agent the base mailbox on QA_TEST_DOMAIN (CAS default factory2key.com.au) — this MUST match what admin-tester/user-tester log in as and what config-fixer puts in ADMIN_EMAILS, or VT_A1 fails 'Access Denied'. The admin-agent is ALSO listed in adminEmails (it must be allowlisted to reach /admin). A third-party deployment sets QA_TEST_DOMAIN to its own deliverable domain to provision its own accounts. qaDomain MUST be a real, mail-capable domain if the QA agents need email-delivery checks (VT_C1/C3/C4); otherwise those run na.
